messages.author: nutcracker
messages.text: Currently in development! Is it just me that is waiting for new repeaters to come online near to where I live? Are you checking daily? Well, maybe MeshWatch (powered by MeshCore) can help here! Once registered, an email with a magic link takes you to the dashboard. MeshWatch is a lightweight “watchtower” for the MeshCore map: you draw one or more watch circles on the map and it’ll keep an eye on those areas for you. An overnight job checks your watch zones and will email you when new repeaters appear! How cool is that!

messages.reactions_html: 8
